title: Ai Friend(Companion)
description: Adds an intelligent AI companion to your world that interacts with you while you play. The AI can chat, respond to events, and keep you company during your adventures, making singleplayer gameplay more engaging and immersive.
body:
# Initial Release

This is the first release of the AI Friend mod.

## Features
- Adds an AI-powered companion to your world
- The AI can interact and chat with the player
- Responds to certain in-game situations
- Designed to make singleplayer gameplay feel less lonely and more immersive

## Notes
- First public version
- More features and improvements planned for future updates
